3d-pipeline: Choose a 3D generation or reconstruction pipeline given input type, output format, and use case.
__cleanup_deprecated_obsidian_vault_path_fix: "Use whenever reading, writing, or syncing anything to Obsidian. Contains correct vault path and sync rules so cached wrong paths are never used again."
a2a-agent-spec: Produce the Agent Card and skills schema for an agent that should be callable over A2A.
a2a-integrator: Design an A2A integration between two agents � Agent Card, task schemas, auth, streaming or polling.
aar-deployment-review: Pre-deployment review of an automated-alignment-research pipeline, including sandbox isolation and log integrity.
ab-plan: Design an LLM A/B test � pick platform (Statsig or GrowthBook), primary metric, guardrails, sample size with LLM-noise buffer, CUPED, sequential stopping, and multiple-comparison correction.
actor-critic-trainer: Produce an A2C / A3C / GAE configuration for a given environment, with advantage estimation and loss weights specified.
actor-runtime: Build an AutoGen v0.4-shaped actor runtime with private state, inbox-per-actor, message-only IPC, fault isolation, and a dead-letter queue.
agent-budget-audit: Audit an agent deployment's cost-governor stack and flag missing layers before enabling unattended runs.
agent-bundle: Produce a portable SKILL.md + AGENTS.md + MCP-server blueprint for a workflow, loadable across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and compatible agents.
agent-loop: Write a correct, minimal ReAct agent loop in any target language/runtime with tools, stop condition, and turn budget.
agent-project-bootstrap: "Kod tamam ama config/install/run eksik olan multi-service AI ajan projelerini aya�a kald�rma deseni. .env, Windows launcher, Hermes Agent entegrasyonu, health check."
agents-sdk-scaffold: Scaffold an OpenAI Agents SDK app with a triage agent, handoffs, input/output/tool guardrails, session store, and a trace processor.
ai-scientist: Build an autonomous research agent that runs experiment tree search, writes LaTeX papers with vision critique, and passes a sandbox-escape red team.
ai-scientist-sandbox-review: Two-gate review checklist for research-loop agent outputs before anything leaves the sandbox.
ai-sre-plan: Design an AI SRE rollout for a team � multi-agent triage architecture, structured runbooks, adversarial evaluation, narrow auto-remediation, and predictive-detection posture.
ai-tutor: Ship an adaptive multimodal personal tutor for a specific subject with Bayesian knowledge tracing, a curriculum graph, safety filters, and a measured two-week efficacy study.
alm-picker: Pick an audio-language model, benchmark subset, output modality (text vs speech), and guardrails for an audio-understanding task.
android: 
any-to-any-pipeline-auditor: Audit a conversational any-to-any design and compute the latency budget for a MIO / AnyGPT / Moshi-family stack.
apikey-image-gen: "Generate or edit images through Hermes Web UI using the selected/requested profile's fun-codex provider from config.yaml."
apple: 
asr-configurator: Pick an ASR model (Whisper variant / Moonshine / faster-whisper) and decoding parameters for a new speech pipeline.
asr-picker: Pick ASR model, decoding strategy, chunking, and LM fusion for a given deployment target.
attack-audit: Audit a red-team evaluation report for attack coverage, budget, judge identity, and behaviour set.
attention-shapes: Debug shape bugs in attention implementations.
attention-variant-picker: Pick a full / sliding-window / sparse / differential attention topology for a new model given context length, retrieval demands, and compute profile.
audio-brief: Translate an audio brief into a model + prompt + eval plan across TTS, music, and SFX.
audio-evaluator: Pick metrics, benchmarks, normalization rules, and reporting format for any audio model release.
audio-llm-pipeline-picker: Pick cascaded (Whisper + LLM) or end-to-end (AF3 / Qwen-Audio) for an audio task, plus the encoder and bridge config.
audio-loader: Validate a raw audio file against a target model's expectations and resample it safely.
automation: 
autonomous-ai-agents: 
bargainer-designer: "Design a negotiation protocol: which agent narrates, which component generates offers, how private scratchpads separate from public messages, what the round bound is, and how deal rate is monitored."
batch-triager: Triage LLM workloads into interactive / semi-interactive / batch lanes, compute stacked discount (batch + cache) savings, and flag mis-triaged workloads.
benchmark-harness: Build a SWE-bench-style harness for a codebase with FAIL_TO_PASS / PASS_TO_PASS gating, contamination checks, and step-count metrics.
benchmark-reader: Read a multi-agent benchmark claim skeptically. Grades the claim on benchmark selection, contamination, baselines, statistical significance, task diversity, and cost disclosure.
bert-finetuner: Scope a BERT fine-tune for a new classification, extraction, or retrieval task.
bias-eval: Audit a bias evaluation report across metric categories, intersectionality, and debias mechanism.
bounded-loop-review: Audit a proposed bounded self-improvement loop against the four-primitive stack (invariants, anchor, multi-objective, regression detection).
browser-agent-trust-boundary: Scope a proposed browser-agent deployment � trust zones, authorized writes, required defenses � before the agent touches a real site.
cache-auditor: Audit an LLM prompt template and traffic pattern for cacheability. Recommend prompt restructure, TTL choice, parallelization fix, and semantic-cache threshold.
card-audit: Audit a model card, datasheet, or system card for completeness and verifiability.
case-study-mapper: Map a proposed multi-agent system design to the closest 2026 production reference (Anthropic Research, MetaGPT/ChatDev, or OpenClaw/Moltbook). Surface known trade-offs, recommended framework, and the specific design decisions already tested in production.
chaos-plan: Design an LLM chaos engineering plan � verify prerequisites, build four planes, pick tool, start with three safe experiments, enforce safety-plane gates.
chatbot-architect: Design a chatbot stack for a given use case.
check-understanding: Phase quiz for AI Engineering from Scratch. Trigger with "quiz me", "test phase", "check my understanding", "do I know phase 3", or `/check-understanding <phase>`.
checkpoint-save-resume: Atomic, sharded checkpoints with full RNG capture so a killed run resumes mid-epoch with the same loss trajectory.
checkpointing-planner: Choose an activation recomputation policy per layer (none / selective / full / offload) given a training config and HBM budget.
chunker: Pick a chunking strategy, size, and overlap for a given corpus and query distribution.
